title: Wakes Reforged
description: Wakes aims to add simple wakes that fit the spirit of vanilla
body:
Wakes aims to add simple wakes that fit the spirit of vanilla
This is a port of the Fabric version by Goby56

Support in [Discord](https://discord.gg/yZbZwya4tN) !

![player in water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6c521fadf609727bd7791cfe319f28e9e0def42_0.webp)

![balls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2562d379e456b235ed828a94fa349d1c7ed12c54.png)
